message:
fix(parser): handle empty function args, oversized hex literals, and shorthand generated columns

- COLLATE parsing now uses parse_identifier() instead of raw token
  matching for robustness
- Function call argument parsing handles empty arg lists (fn()) correctly
- Hex literal parsing truncates to last 16 characters (8 bytes) for
  oversized hex literals, preventing integer overflow
- Generated column syntax now accepts AS (expr) shorthand without
  requiring the full GENERATED ALWAYS prefix

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
